name: You Are the Only Man in Femiganistan
description:
(CW: misogyny) You washed ashore onto Femiganistan, the isolated all female nation formed by the the Yas Queen and her radical feminist followers a few decades ago. This dysfunctional female ran society erased knowledge of sex and childbirth from the population, causing its citizens to suffer sexual frustration without end. Maybe you can help...? Or will you somehow find a way to be rejected by women despite being literally the only man in the country?

Standalone card for Yassandra: https://janitorai.com/characters/f15921bf-f2c4-4a3d-8726-339bafcafe40_character-yassandra-the-yass-queen-of-femiganistan

Funfact, this was originally meant to an antagonist faction within the world of my year 2069 card.

Note: All characters including {{user}} are above the age of 18.
creator: Asper111
